title: Abyssal Salvage
synopsis: An undersea salvage source used to prove the world compiler can turn non-anime ocean exploration material into a playable slice. Divers in a reef dome must recover pressure seals, repair sonar gear, and expose a staged hull breach before the settlement floods.

locations.name: Reef Dome
locations.description: A glass habitat threaded through coral ribs and blue maintenance lights.

locations.name: Sonar Array
locations.description: A ring of hydrophones listening for hull stress beyond the reef.

locations.name: Kelp Quarters
locations.description: Sleeping pods and kelp curtains tucked against the dome wall.

locations.name: Dock Ledger
locations.description: A watertight counter where crews log salvage claims and oxygen debt.

locations.name: Pressure Gate
locations.description: A heavy lock marked by fresh breach warnings and drifting silt.

locations.name: Wreck Engine
locations.description: A sunken turbine room where salvage lights pulse through rust.

characters.name: Neri
characters.description: A calm captain trying to keep the reef dome from evacuating too early.
goals: recover the pearl key before the pressure gate locks
memories: The pearl key vanished near the Sonar Array after the breach alarm.

characters.name: Paxel
characters.description: A patient mechanic who needs a turbine gear to confirm the breach readings.
goals: recover a turbine gear from the Wreck Engine
memories: A turbine gear slipped into the Wreck Engine during the staged alarm.

characters.name: Juno
characters.description: A ledger keeper who will not accuse anyone without physical proof.
goals: collect a coral shell from the Pressure Gate
memories: A coral shell was wedged beside a fake breach tag.

characters.name: Vale
characters.description: A careful medic who notices when panic rises before oxygen levels drop.
memories: The oxygen readings are stable; the breach alarm feels planted.

characters.name: Morrow
characters.description: A smiling saboteur tagging false hull breaches to empty the dome.
goals: force the Pressure Gate to close
secrets: Morrow planted the fake breach tag at the Pressure Gate.
memories: False breach tags work best when crews panic before checking the seals.

conflicts.title: A false breach alarm threatens the pressure gate
conflicts.objective: Raise evacuation panic with false breach tags before the dock ledger proof is gathered.
conflicts.clue: Fresh pink sealant on the Pressure Gate tag points back toward the Reef Dome.

artifacts.name: Pearl key
artifacts.description: A white metal key that opens the pressure gate override.
artifacts.clue: The key slid beneath a hydrophone bracket.

artifacts.name: Turbine gear
artifacts.description: A blue steel gear needed to restart the sonar motor.
artifacts.clue: The gear fell during the staged breach alarm.

artifacts.name: Coral shell
artifacts.description: A reef shell scraped with false breach paint.
artifacts.clue: The shell still holds fresh sealant flakes.

artifacts.name: Pressure map
artifacts.description: A waterproof map showing evacuation valve timing.
artifacts.clue: The map redirects crews away from the dock ledger.

artifacts.name: Sonar radio
artifacts.description: A sealed radio used to confirm real hull stress.
artifacts.clue: The radio needs proof before ordering evacuation.
